name: YarnrcAuthenticate
description: Updates npmScopes/npmRegistries authentication entries in a .yarnrc.yml file using service connection credentials.
helpMarkDown: Provide a path to .yarnrc.yml and optional comma-separated service connections. Matching registries get npmAuthToken/npmAuthIdent and npmAlwaysAuth.
author: Custom

inputs.name: customEndpoint
inputs.label: Credentials for registries outside this organization/collection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated list of service connection IDs.
